question: 在人口统计数据中，找出常住人口超过 100 万的区县名称。
golden_sql: SELECT "区划名称" FROM cq_district_population WHERE "常住人口" > 100;
reasoning_points: 需通过语义匹配找到 cq_district_population

question: 在百度AOI数据中，列出所有类型包含'名胜古迹'的AOI名称。
golden_sql: SELECT "名称" FROM cq_baidu_aoi_2024 WHERE "类型" LIKE '%名胜古迹%';
reasoning_points: 需通过语义匹配找到 cq_baidu_aoi_2024

question: 统计手机信令通勤数据中，各个居住格网的通勤总人数（扩样后人口），并按总人数从大到小降序排列。
golden_sql: SELECT "居住格网", SUM("扩样后人口") AS total_volume FROM cq_unicom_commuting_2023 GROUP BY "居住格网" ORDER BY total_volume DESC;
reasoning_points: 需通过语义匹配找到 cq_unicom_commuting_2023

question: 计算百度AOI数据中每个面状区域的真实面积，并按面积从大到小列出前10名的名称和面积（以平方公里为单位）。
golden_sql: SELECT "名称", (ST_Area(shape::geography) / 1000000.0) AS area_sqkm FROM cq_baidu_aoi_2024 ORDER BY area_sqkm DESC LIMIT 10;
reasoning_points: 需通过语义匹配找到 cq_baidu_aoi_2024

question: 统计在每个历史文化街区多边形内部的高德POI点位数量，返回街区名称和对应的 POI 数量。
golden_sql: WITH h AS (SELECT jqmc, ST_Transform(shape, 4326) AS shape_4326 FROM cq_historic_districts) SELECT h.jqmc, COUNT(p."名称") AS poi_count FROM h LEFT JOIN cq_amap_poi_2024 p ON p.geometry && h.shape_4326 AND ST_Contains(h.shape_4326, p.geometry) GROUP BY h.jqmc ORDER BY h.jqmc;
reasoning_points: 转换小表 polygon 到大表 point 的 SRID，避免对 119 万点逐个 ST_Transform
显式使用 && bbox 预过滤以触发 GiST 索引
注意两表几何列名不同: shape vs geometry
需通过语义匹配找到 cq_historic_districts 与 cq_amap_poi_2024

question: 利用遥感解译分类体系中 Forest 对应林地这一信息，筛选现状用地数据中地类名称包含'林地'的所有图斑，统计其真实总面积（平方米）。
golden_sql: SELECT SUM(ST_Area(d.shape::geography)) AS total_forest_area FROM cq_dltb d WHERE d.dlmc LIKE '%林地%';
reasoning_points: 分类体系表为英文编码(Forest/Cropland)，用地表为中文地类名(dlmc)
LIKE 模糊匹配林地类型
需通过语义匹配找到 cq_clcd_classification_system 与 cq_dltb

question: 计算和平村建设用地管制区与和平村整体规划范围在空间上的重叠/交集面积，结果以公顷为单位返回。
golden_sql: SELECT SUM(ST_Area(ST_Intersection(j.shape, g.shape))) / 10000.0 AS intersect_area_ha FROM cq_jsydgzq j JOIN cq_ghfw g ON ST_Intersects(j.shape, g.shape);
reasoning_points: 两表均为投影坐标(SRID=4523), ST_Area直接返回m², 无需::geography
需通过语义匹配找到 cq_jsydgzq 与 cq_ghfw

question: 寻找距离'解放碑'AOI区域周边 1000 米范围内，且层高大于 30 层的所有建筑物，返回这些超高层建筑的 ID 和层高。
golden_sql: SELECT b."Id", b."Floor" FROM cq_buildings_2021 b JOIN cq_baidu_aoi_2024 a ON ST_DWithin(b.geometry::geography, ST_Transform(a.shape, 4326)::geography, 1000) WHERE a."名称" LIKE '%解放碑%' AND b."Floor" > 30;
reasoning_points: 跨表空间+属性联合过滤
注意两表几何列名不同: geometry vs shape
SRID不一致: geometry=4326, shape=4490, 需ST_Transform对齐后再cast geography
需通过语义匹配找到 cq_baidu_aoi_2024 与 cq_buildings_2021

question: 计算被主干道穿越或切断的历史文化街区个数。
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h.objectid) FROM cq_historic_districts h JOIN cq_osm_roads r ON ST_Intersects(h.shape, ST_Transform(r.shape, 4490)) WHERE r.fclass = 'primary';
reasoning_points: SRID不一致: historic=4490, osm_roads=4326, 需ST_Transform对齐
需通过语义匹配找到 cq_historic_districts 与 cq_osm_roads

question: 百度搜索指数数据记录了城市间的搜索流量，其中 odjsmc 为起点城市名，sszs 为搜索指数。请按起点城市聚合总搜索指数，找出总搜索指数最高的 5 个城市及其对应的总搜索指数数值。
golden_sql: SELECT odjsmc, SUM(sszs) AS total_search_index FROM cq_baidu_search_index_2023 GROUP BY odjsmc ORDER BY total_search_index DESC LIMIT 5;
reasoning_points: ORDER BY DESC 排序取 Top-5
理解 OD 流量表结构
需通过语义匹配找到 cq_baidu_search_index_2023

question: 在和平村规划范围内，统计各个地类在规划区内部的实际分布面积占比，按占比降序排列返回地类名称和比例。
golden_sql: WITH TotalArea AS (SELECT SUM(ST_Area(shape)) AS ta FROM cq_ghfw) SELECT d.dlmc, SUM(ST_Area(ST_Intersection(ST_Transform(d.shape, 4523), g.shape))) / MAX(t.ta) AS area_ratio FROM cq_dltb d JOIN cq_ghfw g ON ST_Intersects(ST_Transform(d.shape, 4523), g.shape) CROSS JOIN TotalArea t GROUP BY d.dlmc ORDER BY area_ratio DESC;
reasoning_points: CTE 计算全局基准面积
需通过语义匹配找到 cq_ghfw 与 cq_dltb
